rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH FERNANDEZ VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, February 3, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH FERNANDEZ's Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
